title: Knowledge Demon

moves.title: Curse of Knowledge
effects: Present each player with a choice between two curse cards to add to their deck
1st use: Disintegration (6 dmg) or Mind Rot
3rd use: Disintegration (8 dmg) or Waste Away

move_pattern: Starts with Curse of Knowledge. Chains: Curse of Knowledge → Slap → Knowledge Overwhelming → Ponder. After Ponder, loops back to Curse of Knowledge while fewer than 3 curses have been used. Once all 3 curses are used, Curse of Knowledge is permanently skipped and the cycle becomes: Slap → Knowledge Overwhelming → Ponder (repeating indefinitely).
notes: Curse of Knowledge forces each player to choose one of two curse cards to add to their deck. The choices scale with each use: (1) Disintegration (6 dmg) or Mind Rot; (2) Disintegration (7 dmg) or Sloth; (3) Disintegration (8 dmg) or Waste Away. After 3 uses the move is permanently replaced by Slap in the rotation. Knowledge Overwhelming sets an internal burnt state (affecting animations); Ponder resets it. Ponder's heal of 30 HP is multiplied by the number of players in the combat.
